name: skillops
description: GitHub-first SkillOps workspace for indie developers and small teams.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:config && electron-builder --config dist-package/electron-builder.generated.json --publish=never
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run build && npm run package:config && electron-builder --config dist-package/electron-builder.generated.json --mac --x64 --publish=never
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run build && npm run package:config && electron-builder --config dist-package/electron-builder.generated.json --mac --arm64 --publish=never
scripts.package:win:x64: npm run build && npm run package:config && electron-builder --config dist-package/electron-builder.generated.json --win --x64 --publish=never
scripts.package:linux:x64: npm run build && npm run package:config && electron-builder --config dist-package/electron-builder.generated.json --linux --x64 --publish=never
